macro.title: Top Biotech Catapults On 'Unprecedented' Results In Cancer - Investor's Business Daily
macro.summary: The company is working in pancreatic cancer, a disease that's typically aggressive and difficult to treat.

macro.title: Report: FBI raids Texas home of man suspected of firebombing Sam Altman’s S.F. mansion - San Francisco Chronicle
macro.summary: Federal agents raided the Texas home of the man suspected of throwing a Molotov cocktail at the San Francisco home of OpenAI CEO Sam Altman.

macro.title: What A Mess: Lufthansa Pilots & Flight Attendants Stage Back-To-Back Strikes - One Mile at a Time
macro.summary: Lufthansa pilots and flight attendants are staging back-to-back strikes, so the airline will shut down for four consecutive days.

macro.title: Texas attorney general probes Lululemon over potential 'forever chemicals' in its activewear - CNBC
macro.summary: The probe will examine whether Lululemon's athletic apparel contains PFAS, which the brand's customers would not expect based on its marketing, Paxton said

macro.title: IBM folds to Trump anti-DEI push, admits no misconduct but pays $17M penalty - Ars Technica
macro.summary: IBM is first firm to pay penalty under Trump's "Civil Rights Fraud Initiative."
